value: I completely understand your frustration—that's definitely a feature that should be working smoothly for you. I've escalated this playlist creation issue to our product team so they can prioritize getting it fixed. I don't have a specific timeline to share just yet, but we're treating this as a priority. In the meantime, if you find any workarounds or if the issue changes in any way, please let us know and we'll keep you updated as soon as we have news on a resolution.
